untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific chart patterns (reversals vs continuations) and their breakout directions, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. The core logic involves pattern recognition and regime-dependent pattern performance metrics that are not translatable to indicator-based conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture market regime switching via SMA crossover (50/200) and trend strength via ADX. However, the original signal's requirement to distinguish reversal patterns from continuation patterns and apply regime-specific performance weights (23% vs 13% etc.) requires pattern detection capabilities beyond available indicators. The entry/exit conditions above represent a simplified trend-following approximation only.
